reviews.comment:
Es parada obligada entre posadas y corrientes y aun así no la mejoran.. debe ser una de las ypf, más flojitas que hay.. baño no siempre está limpio..  servicentro caro y combustible también. . La opción es siempre parar en la de ituzaingo en la medida que las ganas de entrar al baño lo permitan..
Se salva el personal solamente.. muy atento

(Translated by Google)
It's a mandatory stop between Posadas and Corrientes, and yet they haven't improved it. It must be one of the worst YPF stations around. The bathroom isn't always clean, the service is expensive, and so is the fuel. The best option is always to stop at the one in Ituzaingó, as long as you actually need to use the restroom. The only saving grace is the staff—very attentive.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/10294682495924088484/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURBZ3Q2cDZ3RRAB
